hero.title: Sweeten Every Moment with Brijwasi Sweets
hero.subtitle: Delight in authentic traditional Indian sweets, customized celebratory cakes, and artisanal handmade chocolates.

about.title: Crafting Sweets with Legacy
about.story: For generations, Brijwasi Sweets has been the cornerstone of sweetness and celebrations in town. We use high-quality pure ghee, fresh milk, and premium saffron to handcraft recipes passed down through families, keeping authenticity alive in every bite.

services.name: Assorted Premium Sweet Box
services.description: Custom selection box containing Kaju Katli, Motichoor Ladoo, Pista Mawa Roll, and Kesar Peda.

services.name: Custom Celebratory Cakes
services.description: Handcrafted multi-tier cakes for birthdays, weddings, and anniversaries. Order 2 days in advance.

services.name: Festival Gift Hampers
services.description: Beautifully decorated boxes containing sweets, dry fruits, chocolates, and celebratory items.

faqs.question: Do you offer sugar-free options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a dedicated section of sugar-free sweets made with natural sweeteners like stevia, including sugar-free dry fruit ladoos.

faqs.question: Do you ship sweets out of state?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer premium airtight packaging that preserves freshness for nationwide courier deliveries.

hero.title: Welcome to Govindam Residensy
hero.subtitle: Experience luxurious stays, premium hospitality, and breathtaking views right in the heart of the city.

about.title: Where Comfort Meets Elegance
about.story: Govindam Residensy was founded with a single mission: to redefine premium lodging and personalized guest experiences. Every room is designed to blend contemporary design with ultimate relaxation, ensuring your visit is nothing short of exceptional.

services.name: Deluxe Room Stay
services.description: Spacious king-size bedroom with ocean view, workspace, high-speed Wi-Fi, and smart TV.

services.name: Executive Suite
services.description: Ultimate luxury with separate lounge area, jacuzzi, complimentary minibar, and dining spaces.

services.name: Rooftop Fine Dining
services.description: Multi-cuisine restaurant offering local gourmet menus, premium wine tastings, and live music.

faqs.question: What are the check-in and check-out timings?
faqs.answer: Check-in is from 2:00 PM onwards, and check-out is by 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out can be requested, subject to availability.

faqs.question: Is breakfast included in the booking rate?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our room bookings include a complimentary buffet breakfast at our lobby café.
